summary: Iteration 58 - Contract Acceptance E2E Tests - ALL TESTS PASSED (100%). Verified all NEW features: 1) Public Contract Acceptance page at /vertrag (token-based, no auth), 2) Contract title field, 3) Contract value auto-calculation (net, VAT 21%, gross), 4) Appendix creation with both 'type' and 'appendix_type' fields. 17/17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for login flow, dashboard, and contract acceptance page.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Login flow, Dashboard, Contract Acceptance page all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test contracts via API for E2E testing (auto-cleanup not required)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 58 verified all new contract acceptance features. Public endpoints /api/public/contracts/view and /api/public/contracts/accept work without JWT auth (token-based). Contract creation with value field auto-calculates net/VAT/gross. Appendix creation accepts both 'type' and 'appendix_type' fields.

public_contract_acceptance_page.details: Page renders contract details, legal modules, signature input, accept button. Success state shows 'Vertrag angenommen'

contract_title_field.details: Contract creation accepts 'title' field and displays it on contract view

appendix_type_field_tolerance.details: Accepts both 'appendix_type' and 'type' fields for backward compatibility

public_contract_view_api.details: Returns contract data without JWT auth, includes legal_module_definitions

public_contract_accept_api.details: Accepts contract with signature and legal modules, creates evidence package

admin_login_2step_flow.details: Email → Weiter → Role Selection (Administration) → Password → Anmelden

admin_dashboard.details: Shows real stats (72 leads, 27 bookings, 3 chats), no duplicate 'Dashboard' header

admin_navigation_views.details: 21 sidebar items, all views render correctly
